title: Editable gate definition
description:
Allow editing an existing gate definition through the CLI without hand-editing the registry file.

## Background

There is no `gate update` variant (cli.rs:866-1082) and `define_gate` rejects existing keys (commands/gate.rs:656), so the only way to change a gate's fields today is to hand-edit the registry file. Per-issue gate status lives separately on `Issue.gates_status` (types.rs:395), distinct from the registry.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] REQ-16: a gate-update command edits an existing gate's mutable fields with an atomic write and leaves per-issue gate status unchanged, requiring no registry hand-editing.

## Notes

Add a `gate update` command that edits an existing gate's mutable fields via the atomic `write_file_atomic` primitive (storage/atomic_write.rs:34) through `save_gate_registry` (storage/json.rs:633), leaving per-issue `gates_status` (types.rs:395) untouched. Document the command.
